name: assess
description: Deterministic decision classification over a complete spine evidence bundle

arguments.name: artifact
arguments.description: Spine report artifact included in the epistemic basis

options.name: policy
options.description: Policy YAML path or direct selector

options.name: policy_id
options.description: Resolve policy by ID from the configured search path

options.name: json
options.description: Emit JSON output instead of the compact human report

options.name: render
options.description: Emit compact summary output derived from the existing decision/refusal object

options.name: no_witness
options.description: Suppress witness ledger recording on successful assess runs

options.name: describe
options.description: Print compiled operator.json and exit 0 before normal validation

options.name: schema
options.description: Print the assess.v0 JSON Schema and exit 0 before normal validation

options.name: version
options.description: Print version and exit 0 before normal validation

refusals.message: Policy YAML or schema is invalid for assess.v0
Policy selector could not be resolved
Artifact JSON is malformed or missing required assess basis fields
Two or more artifacts resolved to the same canonical tool identity
The selected policy requires a tool that is absent from the observed bundle
No rule matched and no default fallback was available

notes: Decision execution and witness execution are implemented.
Run mode supports compact summary and TSV summary render surfaces via --render.
